product_overview: Hidden Depths is a mental-health mentorship platform combining an immersive WebGL ocean-frontend with a Go backend for secure, anonymous 1:1 session booking, real-time availability via WebSocket, coupon & Razorpay payments, and admin insights. The site is a static Next.js export with Supabase for auth/database and Railway-hosted backend APIs.
core_goals: Provide anonymous, secure 1:1 mentorship bookings with clear availability and anti-double-booking protections.
Offer a calming, performance-adaptive WebGL front-end experience with PWA/offline support.
Support a robust booking lifecycle: recommendations, pending/paid states, payment verification, confirmation emails, and audit logging.
Enable real-time slot availability updates to prevent double-booking and improve UX.
Provide admin tools for metrics and content (insights) management with strict allowlist-based admin access.
Support coupons, scheduled background jobs (reminders/cleanup), and maintain clear audit trails.

features.name: Homepage with 3D WebGL background
features.description: Landing page with an animated caustic ocean background (OGL), hero content, insights carousel, and device-based performance tiers with a Lenis smooth-scroll provider.
user_flows: GET /api/insights -> Receive ordered list of insight cards (200) -> Render carousel using received items
GET /api/insights -> Receive 500 error -> Frontend falls back to statically built insight data

features.name: Booking calendar system
features.description: Date picker restricted to Sundays and Mondays, shows available time slots, allows therapist selection, creates pending or paid bookings, and uses WebSocket for live availability.
user_flows: GET /api/bookings/slots/{date} -> Receive booked and pending slots (200) -> GET /api/bookings/recommendations/{date} -> Receive recommended available slots (200) -> GET /api/ws (WebSocket upgrade) -> Receive 101 and subscribe to availability events -> POST /api/bookings/ with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> and booking payload -> Receive 201 with booking (pending with razorpay_order_id if paid, or paid if free)
POST /api/bookings/ with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> for a slot that was just taken -> Receive 409 Conflict with message 'slot unavailable' -> Frontend prompts user to pick another slot

features.name: Coupon system
features.description: Coupon validation supporting percentage and fixed discounts with checks for max uses, expiry, and active flag stored in Supabase.
user_flows: GET /api/coupons/validate/{code} -> Receive 200 with discount_type, discount_value, remaining_uses -> POST /api/bookings/ with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> and coupon code -> Receive 201 booking with discount applied
GET /api/coupons/validate/{code} -> Receive 404 or 400 with 'invalid/expired' -> Block booking flow and surface coupon error to user

features.name: Razorpay payment integration
features.description: Creates Razorpay orders for paid sessions, verifies HMAC-SHA256 payment signatures, finalizes bookings, and sends confirmation emails with Jitsi links (uses test keys in repo).
user_flows: POST /api/bookings/ with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> for a paid session -> Receive 201 with razorpay_order_id and booking_id (status: pending) -> Frontend completes payment via Razorpay SDK -> Receive razorpay_payment_id and razorpay_signature -> POST /api/bookings/verify with razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_signature -> Backend verifies HMAC-SHA256 -> Receive 200 with finalized booking and confirmation email queued
POST /api/bookings/verify with mismatched signature -> Backend verification fails -> Receive 400 'payment verification failed' -> Booking remains pending and user shown failure

features.name: User authentication
features.description: Modal-based Supabase Auth with email/password and Google OAuth. Frontend stores Supabase-issued JWT and sends it as Bearer token for authenticated API calls. Backend validates tokens locally then falls back to Supabase Auth API.
user_flows: Supabase Auth signIn (email/password) -> Receive JWT access token -> GET /api/bookings/my with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> -> Receive 200 with user's bookings
Supabase Auth signIn (email/password) with incorrect password -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Frontend shows authentication error and blocks authenticated requests

features.name: User profile page
features.description: Displays upcoming and past bookings from backend and supports cancellation with immediate slot release via WebSocket broadcast.
user_flows: GET /api/bookings/my with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> -> Receive list of upcoming/past bookings (200) -> DELETE /api/bookings/{id} with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> -> Receive 200 'cancelled' -> GET /api/ws (WebSocket) -> Receive SLOT_CANCELLED event for the cancelled slot
DELETE /api/bookings/{id} with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> for booking not owned by user -> Receive 403 Forbidden -> Frontend shows authorization error

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Protected admin page showing total paid bookings, upcoming booking count, and estimated revenue. Access controlled via AuthMiddleware + AdminMiddleware (email allowlist).
user_flows: GET /api/admin/stats with Authorization: Bearer <admin_jwt> -> Receive 200 with metrics {total_paid_bookings, upcoming_count, total_revenue}
GET /api/admin/stats with Authorization: Bearer <non_admin_jwt> -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Admin CMS for insights
features.description: Admin interface to create, edit, and delete insight cards for the homepage carousel (title, description, media_url, media_type, sort_order).
user_flows: POST /api/admin/insights/ with Authorization: Bearer <admin_jwt> and insight payload -> Receive 201 created -> GET /api/insights -> New insight appears in list
POST /api/admin/insights/ with Authorization: Bearer <non_admin_jwt> -> Receive 403 Forbidden -> Operation blocked

features.name: Insights carousel on homepage
features.description: Auto-rotating, accessible carousel that fetches ordered insight cards from backend and supports keyboard navigation.
user_flows: GET /api/insights -> Receive ordered list (200) -> Frontend mounts accessible carousel and begins auto-rotate
GET /api/insights -> Receive 500 error -> Frontend logs error and uses statically embedded carousel items

features.name: Blog section (static)
features.description: Static blog pages covering mental health topics; content is statically exported and served with the site.
user_flows: GET /blog (static) -> Receive 200 and blog index HTML -> User navigates to article page GET /blog/anonymous-therapy-benefits -> Receive 200 and article HTML
GET /blog/non-existent-article -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: FAQ page with expandable questions
features.description: Static FAQ page with accessible expandable/collapsible Q&A sections covering process, pricing, and usage.
user_flows: GET /faq (static) -> Receive 200 and FAQ HTML -> User expands a question client-side (no additional backend call)
GET /faq -> Receive 500 from hosting (rare) -> Frontend shows generic 'unable to load FAQ' message

features.name: PWA support
features.description: Progressive Web App with service worker generated by next-pwa, aggressive navigation caching, and offline capability for core static pages.
user_flows: GET /service-worker.js -> Receive 200 and service worker script -> Browser registers service worker and caches navigation assets
GET /service-worker.js -> Receive 404 -> Browser cannot register service worker; offline fallback not available

features.name: Dark/light theme support
features.description: Client-side theme switching via CSS custom properties and Tailwind utilities with smooth transitions, respecting user device preferences.
user_flows: GET / (static) -> Receive 200 HTML and CSS -> Frontend reads prefers-color-scheme and applies matching theme
GET / (static) -> Receive 200 -> User toggles theme client-side (no backend API); theme persisted to localStorage

features.name: WebSocket real-time notifications
features.description: Gorilla WebSocket hub broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED and SLOT_CANCELLED to connected clients; origin validation enforced.
user_flows: GET /api/ws (WebSocket upgrade) -> Receive 101 Switching Protocols -> When another user books, server broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED event -> Client receives event and updates calendar UI
GET /api/ws from disallowed origin -> Server rejects upgrade -> Client receives 403/connection refused and falls back to polling GET /api/bookings/slots/{date}

features.name: Payment success page
features.description: Confirmation page displayed after successful Razorpay payment verification and booking finalization.
user_flows: POST /api/bookings/verify -> Receive 200 verification success -> Frontend redirects to /payment-success -> GET /payment-success -> Receive 200 and confirmation UI
POST /api/bookings/verify -> Receive 400 verification failed -> Frontend does not redirect and shows payment failure message

features.name: Structured data / SEO
features.description: JSON-LD structured data component included in pages to improve search engine results.
user_flows: GET / (static) -> Receive 200 and HTML containing JSON-LD markup -> Search engines index structured data
GET / (static) -> Receive 200 HTML without expected meta tags due to build error -> SEO warnings in monitoring

features.name: Background schedulers
features.description: Cron jobs for hourly reminders for upcoming sessions and a 15-minute cleanup job to expire abandoned/pending bookings.
user_flows: Scheduler runs cleanup job (internal cron) -> Pending bookings older than 15 minutes are marked expired and associated slots freed -> Subsequent GET /api/bookings/slots/{date} returns freed slots
Scheduler runs and encounters DB error -> Cleanup job logs error to audit service; slots may remain blocked until manual or next successful run

features.name: Audit logging
features.description: Service-level audit trail records booking creation, payment verification, and cancellation events for traceability.
user_flows: POST /api/bookings/ with Authorization: Bearer <jwt> -> Receive 201 -> Backend writes audit entry for booking creation -> GET /api/admin/stats with admin token shows new booking metrics
POST /api/bookings/ triggers DB write error -> Backend returns 500 and audit service records failure with error details

features.name: Slot recommendations
features.description: AI/algorithmic recommendation engine suggests optimal booking times for a selected date.
user_flows: GET /api/bookings/recommendations/{date} -> Receive 200 with recommended time slots (based on load and heuristics) -> User selects recommended slot and proceeds to booking
GET /api/bookings/recommendations/{date} -> Receive 500 error -> Frontend falls back to showing raw available slots from GET /api/bookings/slots/{date}

code_summary.description: A mental health therapy booking platform providing anonymous mentorship sessions. Features a Next.js 16 frontend with 3D WebGL ocean effects and a Go backend with Razorpay payment integration, real-time WebSocket updates, and Supabase for authentication and database.

auth.token_format: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header

features.name: Homepage with 3D WebGL background
features.description: Landing page with an animated caustic ocean WebGL background rendered via OGL, hero section, therapy information sections, and smooth scroll powered by Lenis. Includes device-based performance tiers (LOW/MID/ULTRA) for adaptive rendering.

features.name: Booking calendar system
features.description: Date picker restricted to Sundays and Mondays only, with available time slots, therapist selection, and real-time slot availability via WebSocket. Supports both free sessions (before 2026-02-03) and paid sessions (₹99 per 45-min session). Pending bookings auto-expire after 15 minutes.

features.name: Coupon system
features.description: Supports percentage and fixed discount coupons with validation against max uses, expiry date, and active status. Coupon details stored in Supabase PostgreSQL with fields for discount_type, discount_value, max_uses, uses_count, valid_until, and is_active.

features.name: Razorpay payment integration
features.description: Full payment flow: creates a Razorpay order on booking, user completes payment on frontend, backend verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature, then finalizes booking and sends confirmation email with Jitsi meeting link. Uses test keys.

features.name: User authentication
features.description: Modal-based Supabase Auth with email/password sign-in/sign-up and Google OAuth. JWT token passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. Backend validates tokens via Supabase Auth API and JWT secret.

features.name: User profile page
features.description: Displays user's upcoming and past bookings fetched from the backend. Supports booking cancellation with real-time WebSocket slot release.

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Protected admin page showing aggregate metrics: total paid bookings, upcoming booking count, and estimated revenue. Access controlled by AuthMiddleware + AdminMiddleware (email allowlist).

features.name: Admin CMS for insights
features.description: Admin interface to create, edit, and delete insight cards displayed on the homepage carousel. Supports title, description, media URL, media type, and sort order fields.

features.name: Insights carousel on homepage
features.description: Auto-rotating carousel displaying insight cards fetched from the backend. Supports keyboard navigation and accessible controls.

features.name: Blog section
features.description: Static blog pages covering mental health topics. Three articles: anonymous therapy benefits, digital mental health spaces, and signs you need mental health support. Blog index page lists all articles.

features.name: FAQ page with expandable questions
features.description: Frequently asked questions page with expandable/collapsible question-answer sections covering therapy process, pricing, and platform usage.

features.name: PWA support
features.description: Progressive Web App via @ducanh2912/next-pwa. Generates service worker in public/ with aggressive front-end nav caching. Disabled in development mode. Workbox-based caching strategies for offline capability.

features.name: Dark/light theme support
features.description: Theme switching between dark and light modes using CSS custom properties and Tailwind CSS utility classes with smooth transitions.

features.name: WebSocket real-time notifications
features.description: Gorilla WebSocket hub pattern broadcasting SLOT_BOOKED and SLOT_CANCELLED events to all connected clients. Origin validation against allowed origins. Enables real-time booking availability updates on the calendar.

features.name: About page with team info
features.description: Static page with information about the Hidden Depths team and mission.

features.name: Payment success page
features.description: Confirmation page displayed after successful Razorpay payment verification.

features.name: Structured data / SEO
features.description: JSON-LD structured data component for search engine optimization.

features.name: Background schedulers
features.description: Cron-based background jobs: hourly email reminders for upcoming sessions and 15-minute cleanup of abandoned/pending bookings.

features.name: Audit logging
features.description: Service-level audit trail for booking creation, payment verification, and cancellation events.

features.name: Slot recommendations
features.description: AI/algorithm-based slot recommendation engine suggesting optimal booking times for a given date.

api_endpoints.description: Health check endpoint returning server status.
WebSocket endpoint for real-time slot availability updates. Broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED and SLOT_CANCELLED events.
Returns booked time slots for a given date. Includes paid bookings and pending bookings created within the last 15 minutes.
Returns recommended available time slots for a given date.
Verifies Razorpay payment signature (HMAC-SHA256), finalizes the booking, and sends confirmation email with Jitsi meeting link.
Returns all bookings for the authenticated user.
Returns the active subscription for the authenticated user.

Creates a new booking. For paid sessions (after 2026-02-03), creates a Razorpay order and saves booking as 'pending'. For free sessions, saves as 'paid' directly. Broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED via WebSocket.
Cancels a booking by ID. Broadcasts SLOT_CANCELLED via WebSocket and logs the cancellation in the audit trail.
Returns all insight cards ordered by sort_order for the homepage carousel.
Validates a coupon code and returns discount details. Checks active status, max uses, and expiry date.
Returns admin dashboard metrics: total paid bookings, upcoming booking count, and total revenue.
Creates a new insight card (title, description, media_url, media_type, sort_order).
Updates an existing insight card by ID.
Deletes an insight card by ID.

auth_flow.description: Modal-based Supabase Auth with email/password sign-in/sign-up and Google OAuth. On successful auth, Supabase issues a JWT access token. The frontend includes this token as a Bearer token in the Authorization header for all authenticated API requests. The Go backend validates tokens by first attempting local JWT verification with the configured secret, then falling back to the Supabase Auth API (/auth/v1/user) using the Supabase anon key. Admin access is further restricted by checking the user's email against a configured allowlist.
auth_flow.admin_check: Email allowlist via ADMIN_EMAILS environment variable

backend_middleware.name: RequestID
backend_middleware.description: Assigns unique request ID to each request

backend_middleware.name: RealIP
backend_middleware.description: Extracts real client IP from proxy headers

backend_middleware.name: CORS
backend_middleware.description: Cross-origin resource sharing with configurable allowed origins, all standard methods, credentials support, and 300s max age.

backend_middleware.name: AuthMiddleware
backend_middleware.description: Validates JWT Bearer token and extracts user_id and user_email into context

backend_middleware.name: AdminMiddleware
backend_middleware.description: Checks user email against ADMIN_EMAILS allowlist

frontend_pages.description: Homepage with 3D ocean background, hero, therapy info, insights carousel
About page with team and mission information
Article about benefits of anonymous therapy
Article about digital mental health spaces
Article about recognizing mental health support needs
User profile with upcoming/past bookings and cancellation
Payment confirmation page after successful Razorpay transaction
Admin dashboard with revenue metrics and booking statistics
Admin CMS for managing homepage insight carousel cards

frontend_components.description: Sign-in/sign-up modal with email/password and Google OAuth
Date picker (Sun/Mon only), time slot selector, booking form
Auto-rotating insights carousel with keyboard navigation
OGL WebGL caustic ocean background effect
Developer debug panel for performance monitoring
Main page overlay content (hero, sections, booking)

frontend_lib.description: Booking flow logic and state management
Static data constants (FAQ items, therapist info, etc.)

backend_services.description: Audit trail service for logging booking events
Email service for booking confirmations and reminders via gomail
Cron scheduler: hourly reminder checks, 15-min abandoned booking cleanup

known_limitations: Razorpay uses test API keys (not production credentials)
Blog posts are static pages with no CMS backend
WebSocket is used only for slot availability notifications (SLOT_BOOKED/SLOT_CANCELLED)
Booking dates restricted to Sundays and Mondays only
Frontend is statically exported (output: 'export') — no SSR/ISR
Sessions are free before 2026-02-03, paid (₹99) after that date
Admin access is based on a hardcoded email allowlist (ADMIN_EMAILS env var)
